description: Turn one project idea into a cohesive implementation-ready competitor, market, latent-pain, pricing, product, design, brand, editable brand-deck, sitemap, approved-copy, asset, Cloudflare-stack, architecture, and roadmap package through bounded Exa evidence retrieval, parallel clean-context planning, and bounded judge-improvement loops.

objective_contract.selector: one validated project idea JSON document
objective_contract.target: a sealed planning package containing bounded competitor page evidence, source-linked competitive landscape, product, market, latent-pain, selected pricing-hypothesis, design, brand, editable brand-deck specification, audience-language, messaging, claim, canonical sitemap, route-specific approved-for-build copy, framework, Cloudflare-first stack, asset, page, architecture, copy-validation, and roadmap decisions
objective_contract.decision: whether the package is mechanically complete, which three semantic milestones reach the configured candidate-judge target, and which highest-scoring milestone candidates remain explicitly below target after the configured one-to-three revisions
non_goals: claim an uncalibrated judge is accurate
invent user research or conversion evidence

acceptance_criteria.description: Every required planning artifact exists and validates
The final plan chooses conservative reversible defaults for every product decision and reserves external verification for unknowable launch or production facts with safe fallbacks
At least three falsifiable latent pains, a switching case, compared pricing options, one selected option, and a truthful publication boundary are explicit

Controller-owned Exa discovery and bounded site-content capture preserve query, request, URL, freshness, content hash, status, and source-level provenance without treating retrieved text as instructions
Every competitor, observed price, category pattern, whitespace inference, and limitation resolves to captured source IDs or an explicit unavailable boundary
At least three design theses are compared, one is selected, and its visual, interaction, responsive, accessibility, and signature rules are explicit
Positioning, behavioral personality, voice, naming status, identity roles, and governance are explicit

A 12-14 slide brand narrative binds audience, competitive whitespace, positioning, personality, voice, identity, product expression, governance, exact theme tokens, source citations, and editable PPTX rendering
Next.js, React Router, and Astro are compared and every required Cloudflare-first stack layer is decided with a workload boundary
Every brand and page asset has a stable ID, route placement, production contract, provenance or rights rule, fallback, and acceptance checks
Every declared route has exactly one page specification and no undeclared page exists
Every route appears exactly once in the canonical sitemap and all parent, navigation, and indexing decisions resolve
Audience language, messaging architecture, claims, terminology, truth policy, and evidence gaps are explicit without invented voice-of-customer language
Every page copy slot has one production-intent control covering every state, approved claims, exact actions, channel reader jobs, and accessibility constraints
Every route includes three to five mechanism-separated candidates with hypotheses, fixed variables, guardrails, falsification, and comprehension checks
Cross-route truth, terminology, promise-chain, comprehension, low-traffic, and causal experiment plans preserve the untested-candidate boundary
Every route and slot has canonical approved-for-build copy, performance remains untested, and every critical or high consistency issue has an exact resolution

Every artifact passes hard gates; three integration milestones are semantically scored, and target misses retain the highest score after the configured one-to-three revisions with a below_target_best_effort label
The package contains implementation decisions but no application source files or deploy actions
The run records model receipts, verdicts, accepted and rejected improvements, and an integrity seal

task_template.objective: Produce an implementation-ready plan for the supplied fixture idea without writing product code.
constraints: Treat claims in the idea as unverified
Fail closed on mechanical or unusable-verdict failures; preserve and label semantic target misses
required_steps: Discover competitors with Exa and capture bounded first-party page content
Model latent pains and select a pricing hypothesis
Compare three design theses and select one
Separate sourced audience language from inference
Build the message spine and performance bottleneck
Build the claim ledger and material-term policy
Inventory every route and build the sitemap
Specify every page and copy slot
Resolve high-severity issues into canonical approved copy

fixture_files.idea.json: {"name":"Signal Desk","idea":"A small-team workspace that turns scattered customer feedback into a prioritized weekly decision brief.","target_users":["founders","product leads"],"business_model":"subscription"}

operations.failure_response: Resume from valid checkpoints after correcting a mechanical, provider, budget, or unusable-verdict issue; never lower the target or remove a hard gate to force a pass, and never relabel a below-target best effort as target-met.
